CustomField.description: Auto-maintained by the Insurance recalculation flow. Number of the contact's active-policy insurance associations (ContactInsuranceAssociation where linked Insurance Status = Active). Do not edit manually. (활성 보험 건수 - 자동 계산, 수동 편집 금지)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated count of active insurance associations; do not edit manually. (활성 보험 연결 건수 자동 계산. 수동 편집 금지.)
CustomField.label: Active Insurance Count
